methods.description: Ancestral range estimation analyses using models with dispersal matrices to determine the likelihood of different speciation events in shearwaters.

steps.description: Under all tested models, ancestral range estimation analyses, including a dispersal matrix restricting dispersal between areas connected by main historical and present surface ocean currents, had lower AICc than models with an unrestricted dispersal matrix.
steps.searchable_summary: perform ancestral range estimation with restricted dispersal matrix
inputs: historical and present ocean currents data

steps.description: DIVALIKE and DEC models had lower AICc than BAYAREALIKE models, especially when the founder-event parameter (j) was not included.
steps.searchable_summary: compare AICc of DIVALIKE, DEC, and BAYAREALIKE models

steps.description: The likelihood ratio test (LRT) between the best DIVALIKE and DIVALIKE + j models showed that DIVALIKE + j was strongly favoured.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct likelihood ratio test between DIVALIKE and DIVALIKE + j models

steps.description: Under the best DIVALIKE + j model, the South Australia-New Zealand area showed the highest support as the ancestral region of shearwaters.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze ancestral region support under DIVALIKE + j model

methods.description: Process of demultiplexing, cleaning, assembling, and filtering PE-ddRAD-Seq data to generate datasets for downstream analysis.

steps.description: Raw reads were demultiplexed and cleaned using process_radtags in StackS v2.41.
steps.searchable_summary: demultiplex and clean raw reads using process_radtags

steps.description: Built loci using the forward reads with parameters optimised for this shearwater dataset using the UStackS-cStackS-SStackS core clustering algorithm.
steps.searchable_summary: build loci using forward reads with UStackS-cStackS-SStackS

steps.description: Incorporate reverse reads by matching the set of forward read IDs in each locus using tSV2BaM program.
Assembled a contig for each locus, called SNPs using the Bayesian genotype caller and phased haplotypes using GStackS.
steps.searchable_summary: assemble contigs and call SNPs using Bayesian genotype caller

steps.description: Mapped the GStackS catalogue to the Balearic shearwater genome assembly using BWa-MEM v. 0.7.17.
steps.searchable_summary: map GStackS catalogue to genome assembly using BWa-MEM

steps.description: Sorted and indexed the mapped reads using SAMtools v.1.4.
steps.searchable_summary: sort and index mapped reads using SAMtools

steps.description: Integrated alignment positions to the catalogue using StackS-INtEGRatE-aLIGNMENtS.
Filtered SNP data requiring a minimum minor allele count (MAC) of two and an observed heterozygosity below 50% using the POPULatIONS program.
steps.searchable_summary: filter SNP data using POPULatIONS with MAC and heterozygosity criteria
